SEARCH
Package ai.alumnium.client

Class HttpClient

java.lang.Object
ai.alumnium.client.HttpClient
All Implemented Interfaces:
AutoCloseable
public final class HttpClient extends Object implements AutoCloseable
Thin HTTP client that talks to the alumnium server.

Transport details:

  • Uses HttpClient on a virtual-thread executor.
  • Serialises/deserialises JSON with Jackson.

  • Field Details

    • DEFAULT_SERVER_HOST

      public static final String DEFAULT_SERVER_HOST
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

  • Constructor Details

    • HttpClient

      public HttpClient(String url, Model model, String platform, List<?> toolSchemas, boolean planner, Set<String> excludeAttributes)
      Parameters:
      url - explicit server URL
      model - Model to be used by the session
      platform - driver platform string (e.g. "web-selenium")
      toolSchemas - JSON-serialisable tool schemas (maps or annotated POJOs)
      planner - enable the planner agent
      excludeAttributes - accessibility-tree attributes to drop before serialising
